_comment: Manual cluster overrides for VMAX+AERO. Key format: device|itype|iid|mode (mode * matches any). Each entry assigns a chart cluster to a specific JG input identity.
_comment_T-B4_modifier: 63b4c490 button 3 fires change-mode action (Temporary). Same modifier convention as NXT/SOL-R.
_comment_R-B3_physical_modifier_DEFERRED: Sub explained R-B3 is the hardware switch with two positions that add layers of buttons. The two switch positions fire 63b4c490 buttons 21 + 22, but those buttons are ALREADY bound (in SCM/Aux/NAV modes) to T-B1 (Auxiliary Mode Cycle) and T-B2 (Master Mode Cycle). R-B3 is the chart label for the switch itself rather than a separate bind input. Leaving it unassigned for now — will need either an audit-exemption for label-only clusters or a separate JG description hook.
_comment_R-B4_decoy: 40440b60 button 5 fires v_weapon_countermeasure_decoy_launch (Decoy) / v_weapon_countermeasure_noise_launch (Noise in modifier).
_comment_FLIP-TRIG-R: Flip trigger: button 3 of 40440b60 fires the missile-mode/guns-mode toggle (Trigger Up = exit missile mode, Trigger Down = enter missile op mode), button 4 fires the missile launch (Trigger Pulled = FIRE missile).
_comment_MAIN-TRIG-R: 40440b60 button 1 = stage 1 (light pull, fire guns2 in modifier), button 2 = stage 2 (full pull, fire guns0).
_comment_T-E2_speed_limiter_abs: 63b4c490 axis 8 fires v_ifcs_speed_limiter_abs (Speed Limiter ABS, the encoder's axis behavior).
